temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man with a stern, focused expression wears large black headphones. The scene cuts to a close-up of a computer screen displaying a blue-tinted map with grid lines and Chinese characters. The map glitches and distorts with digital static, suggesting a hack or data corruption. (Storyline: This opening sequence establishes a tense, high-stakes situation involving a character who is monitoring a system. The glitching map suggests that something is wrong or being manipulated.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Tense, rhythmic electronic music with a ticking sound, accompanied by digital glitching and static sound effects.)
(00:04-00:05) In a dark, green-lit hallway, a man in a black shirt and glasses cautiously peeks around a corner. He holds a handgun, pointing it forward, as he moves slowly and deliberately through the corridor. (Storyline: This scene introduces a character in a state of high alert, suggesting a confrontation or search is underway. His cautious movement and weapon indicate danger.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, rhythmic music continues from the previous scene.)
